summary: Testing of reported bugs: Smart Scanner and Restore Data. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified login works without 'Session expired' error, Smart Scanner is accessible with Invoice Scanner tab working, and Backup & Restore page is accessible for superadmin.

bugs_fixed_by_main_agent.details: AI model upgraded from gpt-4o to gpt-5.2, duplicate endpoints removed, better error handling added
Users collection now protected from being overwritten during restore - shows 'SKIPPED (protected)'
Token handling improved to prevent race conditions

bugs_fixed_by_main_agent.bug: Smart Stock Scanner missing from sidebar
bugs_fixed_by_main_agent.details: Smart Stock Scanner link added to sidebar menu and is now visible

passed_tests: Admin login successful - no session expired error
Superadmin login successful - no session expired error
Auth/me endpoint working with valid token
Smart Scanner processes test image without 404 error
Restore backup correctly requires superadmin role
Restore backup endpoint accessible by superadmin
Restore backup protects users collection (SKIPPED protected)
Stores endpoint works for Smart Scanner store selector

login_flow.details: Admin and Superadmin can login without 'Session expired' error

smart_scanner_page.details: Smart Stock Scanner visible in sidebar, page loads with all 3 tabs (Excel/CSV Upload, Invoice Scanner, Camera Scan)

invoice_scanner_tab.details: Invoice Scanner tab accessible with Auto Detect, Invoice/Receipt, Handwritten, Inventory List options

backup_restore_page.details: Backup & Restore page accessible for superadmin with Create Backup, Upload Backup, and Google Drive options

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Smart Scanner uses gpt-5.2 model for AI document extraction
GOOD: Restore backup API protects users, sessions, login_history, and api_keys collections
GOOD: Smart Scanner supports multiple document types (auto, invoice, handwritten, inventory_list)
GOOD: Login flow properly clears old token before new login attempt to prevent race conditions
GOOD: Smart Stock Scanner appears in sidebar menu with data-testid='nav-smart-scanner'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: Smart Scanner works with AI extraction (gpt-5.2), Restore Data protects users collection, Login works without session expired error, Smart Stock Scanner visible in sidebar. All reported bugs have been fixed and tested.

smart_scanner.frontend: Smart Stock Scanner page with Excel/CSV Upload, Invoice Scanner, Camera Scan tabs

restore_backup.protection: Users, sessions, login_history, api_keys collections protected

login_flow.fix: Token handling improved - no session expired error

sidebar_menu.fix: Smart Stock Scanner link visible and clickable
